params.itemId: Template ID (itemId = templateId in catalog system)

params.approved: True to add all as testers, false to remove all.

returns.amounts: Array of amounts (always 1 for each item)
returns.templateIds: Array of template IDs that would be granted

params._daySeconds: Length of a game day in seconds

isTester(address).details: This reflects only the raw whitelist mapping and does not consider owner bypass.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._enforce: Whether to enforce Goobs ownership checks

params._goobs: Address of IGoobs contract (or address(0) to disable)

setItemToken(address).details: Allows switching to a new ItemToken1155 proxy (e.g., V2)

params.approved: True to add as tester, false to remove.

setWhitelistEnabled(bool).details: When disabled, anyone may interact with the contract as normal.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

adminShiftTime(int256).notice: Admin function to shift time (for testing)

applyItem(uint256,uint256).notice: Apply an item to adjust creature traits

batchSetTesters(address[],bool).notice: Batch update tester addresses for convenience.

burnItemForSP(uint256,uint256).notice: Burn an item to generate SP

claimDailyItems(uint256).notice: Claim daily items for a creature

claimDailyItemsBatch(uint256[]).notice: Claim daily items for multiple creatures (batch)

getCreatureState(uint256).notice: Get the full CreatureState struct for a creature

getDailyItems(uint256).notice: Get daily items that would be granted for a creature (view-only)

initializeCreature(uint256,uint16,uint16.notice: Initialize a new creature with targets and current values

isTester(address).notice: Returns true if `account` is explicitly marked as a tester in the whitelist mapping.

isWhitelistEnabled().notice: Returns true if whitelist gating is currently enabled.

lockTrait(uint256,uint8).notice: Lock a trait (must be within 5% band)

sendVibes(uint256).notice: Send vibes to a creature (once per day)

setEnforceGoobsOwnership(bool).notice: Owner-only setter to enable/disable Goobs ownership enforcement

setGoobs(address).notice: Owner-only setter for Goobs contract address

setTester(address,bool).notice: Add or remove a single tester address.

setWhitelistEnabled(bool).notice: Enable or disable whitelist gating for the V3 stabilizer.
